arts.ttl: Leeds set to rival Liverpool and Arsenal for exciting left-back amid Junior Firpo doubts
arts.sum: Leeds United have identified Nordsjaelland’s Daniel Svensson as a potential new left-back signing amid Junior Firpo’s ongoing contract situation, according to reports. Firpo has been the unquestioned first choice at left-back for Leeds over the past few years and has been in fine form this season, registering three assists in 13 Championship appearances. Leeds set […] The post Leeds set to rival Liverpool and Arsenal for exciting left-back amid Junior Firpo doubts appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot delivers verdict on controversial penalty in Liverpool's victory over Southampton
arts.sum: Southampton's first-half penalty against Liverpool on Sunday was awarded in contentious circumstances.

arts.ttl: As Man City spiral, Liverpool open historic lead in title race
arts.sum: With Ruben Amorim debuting with Manchester United at Ipswich Town on Sunday and Manchester City's crisis continuing to unfold with their latest defeat, the Premier League was not short of storylines this weekend, but Liverpool going eight points clear at the top of the table over Guardiola's men is the main takeaway. Álvaro Rodríguez's 70th-minute strike in their 2-0 win over Real Valladolid on Friday was Getafe's first goal from open play all season -- as a reminder, we're now on matchday 14, three months into the campaign.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms key starter to return at Liverpool
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti has offered a key update ahead of Real Madrid’s UEFA Champions League trip to Liverpool. The defending champions take on Arne Slot’s Premier League leaders in a mouth watering clash on November 27 at Anfield. Los Blancos returned to La Liga action this weekend with a dominant 3-0 win away at Leganes which […] The post Carlo Ancelotti confirms key starter to return at Liverpool appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Mbappé scores as Madrid moves closer to Barcelona in Spanish league ahead of tough test at Liverpool
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé scored and Real Madrid moved within four points of Spanish league leader Barcelona with a 3-0 win at Leganes on Sunday ahead of its eagerly awaited Champions League match at Liverpool. Madrid will make the trip to England to face Premier League leader Liverpool on Wednesday in the Champions League, and is hoping to recover from a demoralizing 3-1 home loss against AC Milan in the previous round of matches.

arts.ttl: Keane claims City titles hopes will be over if they lose to Liverpool
arts.sum: Roy Keane has claimed the Premier League title race would be over for Manchester City if they suffer defeat against Liverpool next weekend.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'set' for triple injury boost vs. Liverpool as Carlo Ancelotti addresses injury situation
arts.sum: Real Madrid trio Rodrygo, Aurelien Tchouameni and Lucas Vazquez could all be fit for the Champions League clash with Liverpool on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid drop huge team news hint ahead of Liverpool Champions League clash
arts.sum: The latest injury news from the Real Madrid camp as Arne Slot and Liverpool turn their attentions to their Champions League rivals

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends pointed message to Liverpool board over Mohamed Salah's contract
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah scored two goals as Liverpool produced a 3-2 comeback win over Southampton to go eight points clear at the top of the Premier League and Arne Slot was full of praise for the forward

arts.ttl: Gary Neville makes Premier League title prediction U-turn as Liverpool fired two-word warning
arts.sum: Manchester City suffered a fifth successive defeat across all competitions against Tottenham Hotspur on Saturday night
